allow: Bash(node -e "try { require.resolve\('docx'\); console.log\('docx available'\) } catch\(e\) { console.log\('docx NOT available globally'\) }")
PowerShell(Get-Command python, node, pwsh, pandoc -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)

PowerShell($tools = @\("python", "node", "pandoc", "npm", "py"\); foreach \($t in $tools\) { $c = Get-Command $t -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { Write-Output "$t : $\($c.Source\)" } else { Write-Output "$t : NOT FOUND" } })

PowerShell($word = $false; try { $w = New-Object -ComObject Word.Application; $word = $true; $w.Quit\(\) } catch {}; if \($word\) { Write-Output "Word COM available" } else { Write-Output "Word COM not available" })
Bash(cp "C:\\Users\\user\\Desktop\\指标预审卡_设备助手_已填版.html" "C:\\Users\\user\\Downloads\\指标预审卡_设备助手_已填版.html")
